page_metadata.biotools__summary: AMRmap is a interactive web platform for  the monitoring of antibiotic resistance in Russia, which contains a set of tools for the analysis and visualization of data on the susceptibility of microorganisms to antimicrobial agents.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AMRmap is a interactive web platform for  the monitoring of antibiotic resistance in Russia, which contains a set of tools for the analysis and visualization of data on the susceptibility of microorganisms to antimicrobial agents.
